listening.title: Listening: My afternoon in order
listening.transcript: First, I finished my homework. After that, I called my friend. Then we came together at the park, and finally we had dinner together.

questions.question: What did the speaker do first?

listening.title: Listening: Review — A trip to Hue
listening.transcript: Two years ago, I visited Hue with my classmates. First, we explored the old citadel. We didn't have a map at first, so we got lost. Finally, a kind local helped us.
